news.headline: B2Gnow launches Partner Network to drive growth & success for public-sector, offering solutions like business diversity & grant management.
news.summary: Phoenix, on January 9, 2025 - B2Gnow, a prominent company specializing in business diversity, labor compliance, and grant management solutions, has unveiled the B2Gnow Partner Network. This new program aims to establish connections among public-sector entities, including federal and state organizations. Through this initiative, B2Gnow seeks to expand its reach and provide enhanced services to a wider range of clients.

news.headline: Florida Realtors® is offering a Student Scholarship Program for potential real estate careers. Apply now!
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, an announcement was made regarding a Student Scholarship Program by Florida Realtors®. This program is aimed at students currently in college or soon-to-be high school graduates interested in pursuing a real estate-related career. The scholarship presents an opportunity for students to further their education in this field. For more details about this program, interested individuals should reach out to Florida Realtors®.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group launches framework to improve cybersecurity in government agencies, reducing inefficiencies and enhancing protection against cyber threats.
news.summary: New research insights from the Info-Tech Research Group provide a detailed framework for establishing cybersecurity governance across entire governments. This framework assists government organizations and agencies in coordinating responsibilities, reducing inefficiencies, and defending against advanced threats.

news.headline: Nathan Waite named Chief Revenue Officer of AffiniPay in Austin, TX. He brings 20 years of sales experience to the role.
news.summary: AffiniPay, a Texas-based company specializing in legal practice management software and integrated payments, has appointed Nathan Waite as its new Chief Revenue Officer. With over two decades of experience in strategic sales leadership, Waite has previously served in senior positions within the financial technology and SaaS sectors. This move aims to further drive revenue growth for AffiniPay, a renowned player in providing fintech solutions for professionals.

news.headline: Keysight has launched an all-in-one solution for network visibility and security in Santa Rosa, CA.
news.summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif.-- Keysight has introduced a comprehensive solution for network visibility and security. This all-in-one offering aims to enhance monitoring capabilities and bolster cybersecurity measures. This launch comes as a response to the increasing threats posed by cyber attacks, with businesses and organizations increasingly targeted. The solution is designed to provide a holistic approach to network monitoring, ensuring that all potential security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed. This development is significant as it addresses the growing need for robust cybersecurity measures, with cyber attacks on the rise. Keysight's solution is positioned to meet this demand, offering a comprehensive tool for safeguarding networks.

news.headline: Onera Health appoints Maria Sainz as Chair of the Board in Eindhoven, Netherlands. #MedicalDevice.
news.summary: Onera Health, a medical device company based in Eindhoven, Netherlands, has recently appointed Maria Sainz as the new Chair of the Board of Directors. This announcement marks a significant development for the company, indicating a strategic leadership change. Onera Health specializes in the development of innovative medical devices, and Sainz's appointment is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company's governance. This move comes amidst the company's efforts to further establish its presence in the medical device industry.

news.headline: LambdaTest boosts visual testing with SmartUI Visual AI Engine upgrades, leveraging advanced AI, in India & San Francisco.
news.summary: LambdaTest, a company based in NOIDA, India and SAN FRANCISCO, has revealed upgrades to its SmartUI Visual AI Engine. This engine leverages advanced AI technology to boost the precision of visual testing.

news.headline: Ventiva demonstrates fan-less cooling in Intel-powered laptop concept at CES, partnering with Dell and Intel for quiet sub-12mm design.
news.summary: Ventiva®, renowned for thermal solutions, unveiled its Ventiva ICE9® suite in a fan-less laptop design showcased at CES. The laptop, powered by Intel Lunar Lake processors and developed in partnership with Dell Technologies, showcases a new standard of silent performance in sub-12mm laptops. The Ventiva ICE® technology facilitates thin, light, and noiseless functionality in laptops, featuring advanced thermal management solutions for enhanced user experience at the event.

news.headline: BoE's Breeden: Evidence supports gradual removal of restriction.
CSU Global appoints Patti Arroyo as Chief Business Officer, overseeing finance, IT, HR, and student finance.
news.summary: Patti Arroyo has been appointed at Colorado State University Global (CSU Global) to lead various key areas including accounting, finance, compliance, IT, HR, and student finance. In her position, she is responsible for ensuring the financial and operational prosperity of the university. The appointment was made public on January 9, 2025, in Denver.

news.headline: IDEMIA granted 10-year agreement by GSA for next-gen identity proofing for Login.Gov in Reston. Trusted platform with govt partnerships.
news.summary: IDEMIA, a trusted provider of identity proofing and verification solutions, has a strong record of collaborating with government agencies. Based in Reston, Virginia, as of January 9, 2025, IDEMIA Public Security North America is a top player in identity security and authentication services. They possess a wealth of experience and expertise in this field, with a long-standing history of successful partnerships with various government entities.

news.headline: Vivalink wins 2024 Global Healthcare IT Solutions Award from Frost & Sullivan for remote patient monitoring. Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Vivalink, a prominent digital healthcare solutions provider, was recognized for its technology leadership in remote patient monitoring. The company, based in Campbell, California, received the esteemed Frost & Sullivan’s 2024 Global Healthcare IT Solutions Enabling award. This accolade showcases Vivalink's innovative approach in enhancing healthcare through its remote patient monitoring solutions.

news.headline: BoE's Breeden: I expect the bank rate to come down over time.
BoE's Breeden: The upside scenario refers to speech I gave a year ago.
cove.tool rebrands to cove, shifting to a full-service consultancy. Name change showcases new focus.
news.summary: Atlanta-based cove.tool has recently announced a rebranding to cove, signifying its shift from a software provider to a comprehensive consultancy service. This change underscores the company's evolution, emphasizing a more expansive range of services.

news.headline: Intero CEO Brian Crane named in 2025 Swanepoel Power 200 list, recognizing top leaders in real estate industry.
news.summary: A leader in the residential real estate brokerage industry, Intero, a Berkshire Hathaway affiliate and HomeServices of America, Inc. subsidiary based in Cupertino, California, recently shared exciting news. The company's Chief Executive Officer, Brian Crane, has been recognized on the prestigious 2025 Swanepoel Power 200 (SP 200) list. This list highlights the top influential figures in the sector. Brian Crane expressed his gratitude for being acknowledged among the most powerful and respected individuals in the real estate industry.

news.headline: Atlas Holdings sells Saxco to Novvia Group backed by Kelso & Company, deal set to close Q1 2025, exact terms undisclosed.
news.summary: A deal has been struck as Atlas Holdings agrees to sell Saxco International, LLC to Novvia Group, supported by Kelso & Company. The transaction, set to be finalized in Q1 of 2025, is subject to standard closing conditions. Saxco, based in Fairfield, California, serves as a prominent distributor of rigid packaging for beverages. The terms of the agreement have not been made public.

news.headline: Jimmy Carter's casket was carried out of the US Capitol.
BoE's Breeden: upside CPI scenarios are no longer core consideration.
Leer Group partners with Promoboxx and Social Ladder to enhance online tools for dealers and ambassadors, increasing social media reach and engagement.
news.summary: Truck Accessories Group, LLC known as Leer Group based in Elkhart, Indiana has recently partnered with Promoboxx and Social Ladder. This collaboration aims to equip customers with the necessary resources to engage, expand their reach, and leverage the branded social media content and ambassadors. Through the partnership with Promoboxx, dealers can now enhance and streamline their social media presence by sharing compelling content created by Leer Group, ensuring active participation on platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and email campaigns. This collaboration promises a more dynamic and interactive engagement for dealers who sign up.

news.headline: Unisys receives eight leader designations in ISG Provider Lens Multi Public Cloud Services Report for 2024.
news.summary: Unisys, listed as NYSE: UIS, has been recognized as a frontrunner in various sectors in the U.S., U.S. Public Sector, UK, and Brazil due to its digital agility, focus on customer needs, scalability, and automation prowess. This acknowledgment was made public on January 9, 2025, reflecting the company's strong position in the latest 2024 ISG report.

news.headline: Goodyear showcases tire art at Cotton Bowl Classic for Texas and Ohio State with new tread design. #innovation #tradition
news.summary: Intricately crafted sculptures showcasing the innovative tread of the new Goodyear Assurance WeatherReady 2 tire have been revealed in Akron, Ohio on January 9, 2025. Goodyear (NASDAQ: GT) is set to make a comeback at the renowned Goodyear Cotton Bowl Classic in 2025, introducing a dynamic mix of tradition and innovation.

news.headline: Quantiphi is recognized as a Major Player by IDC in Data Modernization Services worldwide. (Characters: 80)
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Marlborough, Massachusetts, Quantiphi, a leading digital engineering company, revealed its recognition as a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape's assessment of Worldwide Data Modernization Services in 2024. This assessment, documented as Doc #US51234424 in September 2024, highlights Quantiphi's exceptional performance in the industry.

news.headline: Ping Identity is named a 2025 Best Place to Work in Austin and Colorado for the 7th year by Built In.
news.summary: In Denver on January 9, 2025, Ping Identity, renowned for safeguarding digital identities for major corporations globally, revealed its recognition as a top workplace for 2025 in Austin and Colorado by Built In. This marks the seventh consecutive year that the company has received this honor.

news.headline: Pacific Valley Bank expands to Santa Cruz, appoints Dean Austin as Senior VP; serving Monterey since 2004.
news.summary: In Salinas, California, on January 9, 2025, Pacific Valley Bank (OTC: PVBK), a prominent community business bank operating in Monterey County since 2004, revealed plans to extend its operations to Santa Cruz. Dean Austin has been appointed as the Senior Vice President & Market President for this expansion.

news.headline: 1 in 6 adult Americans replaced meals with snacks in 2024, reveals Euromonitor International report.
news.summary: In London, data analytics firm Euromonitor International has disclosed that approximately one in six adult residents in the United States are substituting their regular meals with snacks. The company's report titled "World Market for Snacks 2024" highlights that 18% of adult Indians, 17% of adult Americans, and 13% of adult Britons have opted for snacks over traditional meals. This trend is attributed to convenience-focused lifestyle shifts promoting snacking habits and the influence of economic uncertainty on consumer spending patterns.

news.headline: Lindenmeyr Munroe expands into Florida with a new distribution facility in Tampa, continuing growth in North America.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on January 9, 2025, Lindenmeyr Munroe, a prominent company in the paper, packaging, wide format, and facility solutions sector in North America, revealed intentions to broaden its scope by establishing a distribution center in Tampa. This strategic decision marks their entry into the Florida market and signals a significant expansion milestone for the company.

news.headline: Mattel partners with TOKYOPOP for Hot Wheels and Barbie manga graphic novels for ages 8-12.
news.summary: Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) based in El Segundo, Calif., has teamed up with TOKYOPOP to create manga-style graphic novels for kids aged 8-12 featuring Hot Wheels and Barbie brands. The collaboration aims to develop original content for young readers, with the first series inspired by Hot Wheels. This partnership combines Mattel's iconic brand portfolio with TOKYOPOP's expertise in manga and anime to bring new and exciting storytelling to children. The graphic novels will offer a unique twist on the beloved Hot Wheels and Barbie characters, providing young audiences with fresh, engaging content within the manga genre.

news.headline: DaVita aids thousands impacted by SoCal wildfires with emergency plan; ensures safety of patients & teammates.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Los Angeles, DaVita, a leading kidney care provider, has implemented its emergency plan in response to the raging wildfires in Southern California. The plan aims to ensure the safety of both patients and employees.

news.headline: Shell has commenced production at the Whale facility in US Gulf of Mexico, featuring Vito's design.
news.summary: Shell Offshore Inc., a subsidiary of Shell plc, recently revealed the commencement of production at the Whale floating production facility in the Gulf of Mexico. This facility, operated by Shell, adopts a streamlined and cost-effective design similar to the Vito platform. The development marks a significant milestone for the company in the region.

news.headline: MotionPoint acquires Key Content, enhancing multilingual marketing with website translation and localization capabilities.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, MotionPoint, a leading company specializing in website translation and localization based in Coconut Creek, Florida, revealed their acquisition of Key Content, a top multilingual content marketing agency. This move aims to boost MotionPoint's capacity to provide enhanced services.

news.headline: LG Energy Solution will exclusively supply 2170 cylindrical battery cells for Aptera's solar electric vehicles in the U.S. market by 2025.
news.summary: LG Energy Solution has inked a deal with Aptera and CTNS for the supply of 2170 cylindrical battery cells for the 'Aptera' vehicle. This agreement spans over seven years and is set to support the vehicle's launch in the U.S. market by 2025. This partnership solidifies LG Energy Solution's position as a leading player in the growing solar EV industry.

news.headline: Ticketbud introduces Integrated Waiver feature to speed up event entry, eliminating long lines and delays at ticket check-in.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on January 9, 2025, a recent development has revolutionized the event check-in process. Ticketbud's Integrated Waiver feature has eliminated long lines and delays, allowing event organizers to collect signatures and scan tickets efficiently at check-in. This innovative feature has significantly reduced wait times, enhancing the overall event experience.

news.headline: UNC Health Wayne incorporates MEDI+SIGN digital whiteboards for better patient care. 316-bed hospital in Smithsburg, MD.
news.summary: In Smithsburg, Maryland, on January 9, 2025, UNC Health Wayne, a top healthcare facility with 316 beds, has implemented MEDI+SIGN technology. This equipment upgrade comes as part of UNC Health Wayne's dedication to providing superior patient care and cutting-edge medical services at its acclaimed hospital.

news.headline: FORM and Google team up to offer augmented reality on Google devices for Retail & CPG industries. Announced at NRF 2025.
news.summary: Next-generation image recognition technology will be unveiled at NRF 2025 in Quincy, Massachusetts on January 9, 2025. FORM, a prominent provider of AI-driven field execution software, has collaborated with Google to integrate augmented reality (AR) capabilities into its acclaimed platform. This technology is specifically tailored for Retail and Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) industries and aims to enhance the shopping experience.

news.headline: Festool improves tools for professionals in woodworking & painting. Launches new products for drywallers.
news.summary: Lebanon, Indiana, January 9, 2025 - Festool, a renowned premium tool manufacturer, has unveiled its latest product for drywallers, painters, and woodworkers. As a frontrunner in advanced and durable power tool solutions, Festool's new launch marks the beginning of an exciting year for the industry.

news.headline: VP Racing Fuels marks 50 years of Makin' Power®, a global leader in performance fuel products since 1975.
news.summary: San Antonio-based VP Racing Fuels, Inc., a global leader in performance fuel products, kicks off 2025 commemorating 50 years of Makin' Power®. The company has experienced significant growth over the past half-century, with particularly rapid expansion in recent years.

news.headline: Jack Poindexter named regional leader, Kevin Chen & Chris Strock as Bay Area co-leaders at DPR. Great transitions in self-performing GC project growth in the region.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Jack Poindexter took on the position of regional leader, while Kevin Chen and Chris Strock were named co-leaders of the Bay Area Business Unit. Together, they are continuing the company's successful leadership transition legacy. Under their guidance, the company's self-performing general contracting projects are expected to grow significantly in the region. This announcement comes as a part of the company's ongoing efforts to expand its presence, marking a significant development in its operations.

news.headline: BoE Breeden: There is some tentative evidence that activity is starting to weaken, though we expect it to pick up again.
BoE's Breeden: Inflation has fallen materially in last year.
BoE Breeden: it is difficult to know how quickly to remove the restrictive policy.
Ideagen named ‘Leader’ in Verdantix Green Quadrant: EHS Software 2025. Highest scores in AI integration and document management.
news.summary: An environmental health and safety (EHS) software provider, Ideagen, based in Nottingham, England, has been recognized as a top performer in the Verdantix Green Quadrant: EHS Software 2025. The company excelled in AI integration, document management, and quality management, solidifying its position as a 'Leader' in the industry. Following the surge in AI adoption in 2022, the EHS software market has experienced significant transformation, with AI capabilities reshaping the user experience and value proposition. Ideagen's advanced AI integration has been particularly noteworthy, marking a milestone in the evolving landscape of EHS solutions.

news.headline: Arctera named a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications Governance and Archiving Solutions.
news.summary: Arctera, formerly part of Veritas Technologies, a renowned data management firm based in Pleasanton, California, has been recognized as a Leader in the first Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications Governance and Archiving Solutions (DCGA). This acknowledgment follows Arctera's recent decision to enhance its Data Compliance InfoScale and Backup Exec branches after its separation from Veritas. The new Gartner report signifies the company's strong positioning in the industry.

news.headline: Chart Industries Inc. makes Newsweek's 2025 Most Responsible Companies list, moving up 250 spots to rank #287.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Chart Industries, Inc. (NYSE: GTLS), a leading provider of clean energy and industrial gas solutions, has been named on Newsweek's 2025 America’s Most Responsible Companies list. This marks the second year in a row that Chart has been honored for its commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) efforts. The company has climbed 250 spots from last year and now holds the #287 position on the list.

news.headline: Edmonton and area school support workers to strike, 3,000 from Local 3550 and 200 from Local 4625, starting Monday.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, two groups of education support workers from the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) are set to issue strike notice today. CUPE Local 3550, representing more than 3,000 educational support staff at the Edmonton Public School Board, and CUPE Local 4625, representing over 200 staff members at the Sturgeon Public School Division, are both involved. Job action may commence as early as next Monday. Additionally, more than 1,000 education support workers in Fort McMurray have been on strike since November.

news.headline: US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on January 13, to settle on January 16.
US to sell $84 bln 3-month bills on January 13, to settle on January 16.
